prompt: Create a photorealistic luxury product photograph of a single perfume bottle centered on a glossy wet black marble surface with fine white and gold veining. The bottle is faceted clear glass with a rounded-square octagonal silhouette, filled with rich amber golden-brown perfume, visible internal reflections, tiny air bubbles, and vertical refraction lines; it has a short neck and a smooth cylindrical brushed-metal champagne gold cap with a small minimalist monogram on top. Surround the bottle with scattered water droplets and several larger shallow puddles that create mirror reflections and subtle rainbow caustic highlights. Use dramatic golden hour backlight from the upper rear, casting warm sunbeams through a peach-orange background haze, strong rim highlights on the glass, sparkling specular points on the wet stone, and a crisp reflection of the bottle in the foreground. Shoot at table height with a premium advertising look, shallow depth of field, sharp focus on the bottle, cinematic contrast, ultra-detailed glass and liquid physics, elegant black-and-gold color palette, square composition, no visible label text, no hands, no extra products.
